ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study or survey */,
  "country" INTEGER /* Country where the study was conducted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the study */,
  "lead_researcher" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_lead_researcher FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the participant is part of */,
  "age_category" INTEGER /* Age category of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the participant (in cm) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the participant (in kg) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "mother_education" TEXT /* Mother's level of education */,
  "father_education" TEXT /* Father's level of education */,
  "household_income" REAL /* Household income */,
  "ever_stunted" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the participant has ever been stunted */,
  "n_cell" INTEGER /* Number of cellular connections in the household */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_age_category FOREIGN KEY ("age_category") REFERENCES age_categories ("agecat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Health expenditure as a percentage of GDP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_categories" (
  "agecat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "agecat_description" TEXT /* Description of the age category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range in years */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agecat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant whose household this is */,
  "nhh" TEXT /* Number of household members */,
  "household_type" TEXT /* Type of household (e.g., nuclear, extended) */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Source of water for the household */,
  "sanitation_type" TEXT /* Type of sanitation facility */,
  "housing_material" TEXT /* Material of the house (e.g., brick, mud) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stunting_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stunting status record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "ever_stunted" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the participant has ever been stunted */,
  "stunting_severity" TEXT /* Severity of stunting (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "last_measured_date" TEXT /* Date of the last measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stunting_status_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cellular_connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cellular connection record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "n_cell" INTEGER /* Number of cellular connections in the household */,
  "internet_access" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the household has internet access */,
  "type_of_device" TEXT /* Type of devices used (e.g., smartphone, basic phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cellular_connections_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study */,
  "data_collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collector */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., in-person, online) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the collected data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_data_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collector_id") REFERENCES data_collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the data collector */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the data collector belongs to */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications of the data collector */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the report findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access (e.g., 1 hour, 1 day) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
